type_definitions.name: TypeGraph
type_definitions.description: Pre-indexed view of a crate public API for type catalogue evaluation — guard against accidental modification during graph renderer implementation

type_definitions.name: TypeNode
type_definitions.description: A public type in the crate as indexed for TDDD evaluation — guard against accidental modification

type_definitions.name: TraitNode
type_definitions.description: A public trait in the crate as indexed for TDDD evaluation — guard against accidental modification
